title: QTable
description: Items can be placed on the crafting table.
body:
Crafting Table | Stick Table
|-|-|
| ![Ctable](https://i.imgur.com/qUluc6G.gif) | ![Stable](https://i.imgur.com/BJWVXmF.gif) |

[日本語](https://github.com/200Q-1/QTable/)
# Description
A data pack that allows you to place items directly on the crafting table for crafting without having to open the GUI.
It is also possible to create a primitive crafting table using sticks.
Recipes can also be added from other data packs.

# Dependencies(After 4.2.0)
### Required
+ [PrettyCrafter](https://github.com/Ai-Akaishi/PrettyCrafter)
+ [AiMath](https://github.com/Ai-Akaishi/AiMath)

# How To Use
### Standard
1. Set up the crafting table as usual(Disabled by Sneak)
2. Move the cursor over the slot to confirm that particles appear
3. Right click to place item

### Stick Table
* You can place it by holding 8 sticks and right clicking on the ground
* You can destroy it by right clicking three times on an empty slot with your empty hand

## Unsupported recipe
+ map extending
+ armor dye
<details>
<summary>Before4.2.0</summary>

+ armor dye
+ book cloning
+ firework star
+ map extending
+ repair item

</details>


## Uninstall
```mcfunction
function qrafting_table:uninstall
```
You can delete all scoreboards and entities in the QTable by executing this command.
(Items placed in the table will be dropped.)

## Add Recipe
[WIKI](https://github.com/200Q-1/QTable/wiki)
